name: io.github.hidai25/evalview-mcp
description: Regression testing for AI agents. Golden baselines, CI/CD, LangGraph, CrewAI, OpenAI, Claude.

environmentVariables.name: OPENAI_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: OpenAI API key for LLM-as-judge output quality scoring. Optional — deterministic tool/sequence evaluation works without it.
